tasks.subject: Task 0: R7 브랜치 + spec §10 R7 체크리스트 확장 + plan + tasks.json + Decision Log
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `rolestra-phase-r7` 브랜치 main tip(`1bfa3e1`)에서 분기. spec §10 Phase R7 블록을 R3/R4/R5/R6 와 동일한 체크박스+산출물 링크 템플릿으로 확장. Decision Log 8건(D1~D8) 기록. tasks.json 14-slot skeleton.

**Files:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-22-rolestra-phase-r7.md, docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-22-rolestra-phase-r7.md.tasks.json, docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-18-rolestra-design.md (§10 Phase R7만)

**Verify:** `git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD` == rolestra-phase-r7

```json:metadata
{"files":["docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-22-rolestra-phase-r7.md","docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-22-rolestra-phase-r7.md.tasks.json","docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-18-rolestra-design.md"],"verifyCommand":"git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD","acceptanceCriteria":["rolestra-phase-r7 브랜치 생성","Decision Log에 D1~D8 8건 기록","§10 Phase R7 체크박스+산출물 템플릿 확장","tasks.json 14-slot skeleton 존재"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Shared approval-stream-events.ts + ApprovalPayload discriminated union
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/shared/approval-stream-events.ts` 신규 (stream:approval-created/decided discriminated union + zod). `src/shared/approval-types.ts` 에 ApprovalPayload 3 kind(cli_permission / mode_transition / consensus_decision) discriminated union 추가. 기존 stream-events.ts re-export.

**Files:** src/shared/approval-stream-events.ts, src/shared/approval-types.ts, src/shared/stream-events.ts, src/shared/__tests__/approval-stream-events.test.ts

**Verify:** `npm run test -- approval-stream-events`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/shared/approval-stream-events.ts","src/shared/approval-types.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- approval-stream-events","acceptanceCriteria":["ApprovalPayload 3 kind discriminated union","stream:approval-* 2 이벤트 + zod","typecheck 회귀 0","zod round-trip 6~8 케이스"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: ApprovalStreamAdapter + usePendingApprovals 실시간 전환
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/main/approvals/approval-stream-adapter.ts` 신규 — ApprovalService EventEmitter('created'/'decided') → StreamBridge emit('stream:approval-*'). main/index.ts 에서 wire() 호출. `usePendingApprovals` 를 mount-fetch + stream 구독 병행으로 전환.

**Files:** src/main/approvals/approval-stream-adapter.ts, src/main/streams/stream-bridge.ts, src/main/index.ts, src/preload/index.ts, src/renderer/hooks/use-pending-approvals.ts + __tests__

**Verify:** `npm run test -- approval-stream-adapter use-pending-approvals`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/approvals/approval-stream-adapter.ts","src/renderer/hooks/use-pending-approvals.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- approval-stream-adapter use-pending-approvals","acceptanceCriteria":["ApprovalService.create → stream:approval-created emit","ApprovalService.decide → stream:approval-decided emit","hook mount-fetch + stream 병합 정확","disposer 호출 시 listener 0","8~12 테스트 green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: ApprovalCliAdapter + MeetingTurnExecutor CLI permission v3 교체
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/main/approvals/approval-cli-adapter.ts` 신규 — `createCliPermissionApproval(ctx) → Promise<boolean>` (create + subscribe-once('decided') + timeout 5분 기본 + auto-expire). MeetingTurnExecutor.setPermissionRequestCallback 내부 `registerPendingCliPermission` + `legacyEmit('stream:cli-permission-request')` 전체를 adapter 한 줄로 교체. approvalService DI 추가.

**Files:** src/main/approvals/approval-cli-adapter.ts + __tests__, src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-turn-executor.ts, src/main/index.ts, src/main/meetings/engine/__tests__/meeting-turn-executor.test.ts

**Verify:** `npm run test -- approval-cli-adapter meeting-turn-executor`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/approvals/approval-cli-adapter.ts","src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-turn-executor.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- approval-cli-adapter meeting-turn-executor","acceptanceCriteria":["registerPendingCliPermission 호출 0 (grep)","approve/conditional → true, reject/timeout → false","listener leak 0","ApprovalService.create 인자 검증","5~8 테스트 green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: v2 cli-permission-handler + IPC + stream 이벤트 + preload 완전 제거
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/main/ipc/handlers/cli-permission-handler.ts` 파일 삭제. `cli-permission:respond` IPC 채널 / `stream:cli-permission-request` 이벤트 / preload 화이트리스트 / renderer legacy subscriber 전부 제거. typecheck exit 0 보장.

**Files:** src/main/ipc/handlers/cli-permission-handler.ts (삭제), src/shared/ipc-types.ts, src/shared/stream-types.ts, src/preload/index.ts, src/main/ipc/handler-registry.ts 또는 index.ts, 관련 renderer subscriber

**Verify:** `grep -r cli-permission src/ | grep -v 주석` returns 0 + `npm run typecheck`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/shared/ipc-types.ts","src/shared/stream-types.ts","src/preload/index.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run typecheck","acceptanceCriteria":["cli-permission-handler.ts 파일 삭제","grep -r 'cli-permission' src/ 결과 0 (코드)","grep -r 'registerPendingCliPermission' src/ 결과 0","typecheck exit 0","기존 테스트 회귀 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: ApprovalBlock onDecision wire + RejectDialog + ConditionalDialog
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ApprovalBlock 의 `onDecision` placeholder 제거 → 실 `approval:decide` IPC. deny/conditional 은 Radix Dialog 코멘트 입력. RejectDialog.tsx / ConditionalDialog.tsx 신규.

**Files:** src/renderer/features/messenger/ApprovalBlock.tsx, src/renderer/features/approvals/{RejectDialog,ConditionalDialog}.tsx + __tests__

**Verify:** `npm run test -- ApprovalBlock RejectDialog ConditionalDialog`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/features/messenger/ApprovalBlock.tsx","src/renderer/features/approvals/RejectDialog.tsx","src/renderer/features/approvals/ConditionalDialog.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- ApprovalBlock RejectDialog ConditionalDialog","acceptanceCriteria":["approve → invoke('approval:decide', {id, decision:'approve'})","reject+comment → invoke 인자 정확","conditional+comment → invoke 인자 정확","다이얼로그 cancel 시 invoke 0","3-way 스타일(warm/tactical/retro) 회귀 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: ApprovalSystemMessageInjector — reject/conditional comment 시스템 메시지 주입
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/main/approvals/approval-system-message-injector.ts` 신규 — ApprovalService 'decided' 이벤트 구독 → decision ∈ {reject, conditional} + comment != null + meetingId + channelId 필터 → MessageService.append(kind='system'). spec §7.7 '다음 턴 시스템 메시지로 주입' 구현.

**Files:** src/main/approvals/approval-system-message-injector.ts + __tests__, src/main/index.ts

**Verify:** `npm run test -- approval-system-message-injector`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/approvals/approval-system-message-injector.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- approval-system-message-injector","acceptanceCriteria":["reject+comment → msgSvc.append 호출","conditional+comment → 위와 동일","approve → skip","meetingId/channelId null → skip","6~8 테스트 green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: ApprovalInboxView + Thread #승인-대기 채널 분기 렌더
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/renderer/features/approvals/ApprovalInboxView.tsx` 신규 — `#승인-대기` 시스템 채널 Thread 전용 컨테이너(pending approval 리스트 → ApprovalBlock 반복). Thread.tsx 는 채널 kind='system_approval' 일 때 ApprovalInboxView 단독 렌더로 분기. usePendingApprovals 에 projectId 옵션 추가.

**Files:** src/renderer/features/approvals/ApprovalInboxView.tsx + __tests__, src/renderer/features/messenger/Thread.tsx, src/renderer/hooks/use-pending-approvals.ts

**Verify:** `npm run test -- ApprovalInboxView Thread`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/features/approvals/ApprovalInboxView.tsx","src/renderer/features/messenger/Thread.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- ApprovalInboxView Thread","acceptanceCriteria":["#승인-대기 채널 → ApprovalInboxView","pending 리스트 렌더 정확","decide 후 stream 이벤트로 사라짐","다른 채널 Thread 렌더 regression 0","빈 상태 i18n 경유"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: ProjectService.updatePermissionMode — mode_transition approval flow
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ProjectService 에 `requestPermissionModeChange` / `applyPermissionModeChange` 추가. 활성 회의 체크(CB-3) + external+auto 금지(§7.3) + TOCTOU 재검증. approved 'decided' 이벤트 라우터가 apply 호출. IPC `project:request-permission-mode-change` 추가.

**Files:** src/main/projects/project-service.ts + __tests__, src/main/approvals/approval-decision-router.ts (또는 SystemMessageInjector 확장), src/main/ipc/handlers/project-handler.ts

**Verify:** `npm run test -- project-service approval-decision-router`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/projects/project-service.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- project-service","acceptanceCriteria":["requestPermissionModeChange → approval_items row 생성","approved → permission_mode DB UPDATE","external+auto 거절","활성 회의 거절","TOCTOU 재거절 시 superseded","4~6 테스트 green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Consensus Decision Approval — SSM DONE 게이트
tasks.description:
**Goal:** MeetingOrchestrator/v3-side-effects 가 SSM DONE 도달 시 즉시 MinutesComposer 포스팅하지 않고 `consensus_decision` approval 을 생성, decided 이벤트 대기. approve → R6 경로, reject → `#회의록` 거절 메시지 + outcome='rejected', conditional → approve + injector. timeout 24h → expired.

**Files:** src/main/engine/v3-side-effects.ts, src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-orchestrator.ts + __tests__

**Verify:** `npm run test -- meeting-orchestrator v3-side-effects`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/engine/v3-side-effects.ts","src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-orchestrator.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- meeting-orchestrator v3-side-effects","acceptanceCriteria":["SSM DONE → consensus_decision approval row","approve → MinutesComposer 포스팅 + accepted","reject → 거절 메시지 + rejected","conditional → approve + injector 연동","timeout 24h → expired","테스트 green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Dashboard ApprovalsWidget → #승인-대기 채널 라우팅
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ApprovalsWidget 의 `onRowActivate` 기본값이 activeChannelStore.setActiveChannel + appViewStore.setView('messenger') 로 #승인-대기 채널 라우팅. `useSystemChannel(projectId, 'system_approval')` 조회 훅 추가.

**Files:** src/renderer/features/dashboard/widgets/ApprovalsWidget.tsx + __tests__, src/renderer/hooks/use-system-channel.ts (필요 시)

**Verify:** `npm run test -- ApprovalsWidget`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/features/dashboard/widgets/ApprovalsWidget.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- ApprovalsWidget","acceptanceCriteria":["row 클릭 → activeChannelStore 업데이트","messenger 뷰 전환","projectId=null 안전 fallback","기존 3-way 스타일 회귀 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: NotificationService approval_pending 트리거
tasks.description:
**Goal:** NotificationService 가 ApprovalService 'created' 이벤트 구독 → approval_pending OS notification 발사 (앱 비포커스 시). 클릭 시 #승인-대기 채널 라우팅 힌트.

**Files:** src/main/notifications/notification-service.ts + __tests__, src/main/index.ts

**Verify:** `npm run test -- notification-service`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/notifications/notification-service.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- notification-service","acceptanceCriteria":["ApprovalService.create → Notification enqueue (비포커스)","포커스 시 skip","클릭 → stream:notification-clicked 힌트","중복 suppress"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: i18n populate approval.* + messenger.approval.* + dashboard.approvals.* + E2E approval-flow.spec.ts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ko/en locale 에 approval.kind.* / approval.systemMessage.* / messenger.approval.rejectDialog.* / conditionalDialog.* / messenger.approval.inboxEmpty / dashboard.approvals.* / notification.approvalPending.* 전체 populate. i18next-parser config 의 dynamic 키 keepRemoved regex 확장. Playwright approval-flow.spec.ts 1 시나리오.

**Files:** src/renderer/i18n/locales/{ko,en}.json, i18next-parser.config.js, e2e/approval-flow.spec.ts

**Verify:** `npm run i18n:check` idempotent + `npm run typecheck:web`
